text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During a partner run with Satono Diamond
several days before her debut race, Kitasan Black
finds herself finishing first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Satono Diamond finds it strange she
couldn't overtake Kitasan Black, like she usually
is able to...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black's confidence is bolstered by the
fruition of her training, and she looks forward to
her debut.
